name: Pineapple-Apricot Jam
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Dried apricots, cut into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and maraschino cherries, reserving 1/3 cup of the syrup. Chop the cherries into small pieces.
2. Heat the crushed pineapple with its reserved syrup, the cherry syrup, apricots, and water in a Dutch oven until boiling, stirring occasionally.
3. Reduce heat and cover; simmer, stirring occasionally, until apricots are tender (about 10 minutes).
4. Stir in sugar, lemon juice, and chopped cherries. Heat to full rolling boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
5. Boil for 1 minute after reaching a full boil. Remove from heat; stir in pectin.
6. Pour into hot sterilized jars or glass containers or freezer-safe containers. Cover and cool to room temperature.
7. Store in refrigerator or freezer for no more than 3 months.
